name: altitude-plugin-marketplace
description: Altitude Wealth Management Platform — plugins for API interaction, onboarding, and search

plugins.name: m62-altitude-onboarding
plugins.description: Extract entity data from household document folders and onboard to the Altitude wealth management platform. Reads PDFs, images, spreadsheets — extracts individuals, trusts, accounts, insurance, tangible assets, liabilities, and relationships.

plugins.name: m62-altitude-api
plugins.description: Interact with the Altitude wealth management platform — query, create, and update entities via the REST API. Includes embedded OpenAPI docs for endpoint discovery. Covers individuals, households, accounts, trusts, insurance, liabilities, tangible assets, positions, documents, and more.

plugins.name: m62-altitude-search
plugins.description: Search and retrieve information from the Altitude wealth management platform — individuals, households, accounts, trusts, valuations, holdings, liabilities, and insurance policies.
